one_liner: Solo builder prototyping a lightweight inference cache for local LLMs.
founder_ctx: Priya — solo founder, no company yet, no funding history, no prior startups. Public footprint: a personal open-source project 'llmcache' with 120 GitHub stars (built over the last 8 months, steady solo commits), and one well-received technical blog post on KV-cache reuse for local inference. No team, no revenue, no design partners. Evidence refs: github.com/priya/llmcache (120 stars), priya.dev/blog/kv-cache-reuse.

claims.text: Prototype reuses KV-cache across sessions to cut local inference latency.

evidence.snippet: priya/llmcache — 120 stars, single maintainer, 8 months of commits, working demo notebook and benchmarks in README.

claims.text: Solo technical founder with deep local-inference domain insight.

evidence.snippet: Technical blog post on KV-cache reuse for local LLMs, shared widely in inference communities; detailed and technically credible.
